# FIXTURE PROVENANCE

`manifest.json` in this directory is a verbatim copy of
`gptpowerups-extension` manifest.json at commit `2c371b1d5ce2fb47145f3196ddca1b63fd7af0de`
(parent of `b2805d2` "fix(cws): remove Cursor mismatch (B-2), move tabs to
optional_permissions (M-1)"), reachable from `origin/chi/d137-baseline-green`.

At this commit, `"tabs"` was declared in the mandatory `permissions[]` array.
It was moved to `optional_permissions[]` by the fix commit above (M-1).
